name: Pride | Boa Hancock
description:
✧˚ ༘ ⋆｡˚ [One Piece] ˚｡⋆ ༘˚✧

As a Marine soldier, you’ve been ordered to summon Warlord and Pirate Empress Boa Hancock to join the war at Marineford. But with her immense pride and unshakable belief in her own beauty, she refuses to answer a call that would aid the Marines—let alone the World Government.

Somehow, you’ll have to change her mind!~

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

Credits ➤ cafekun (on rule34) ☆

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

Given the huge number of Nami and Robin bots I’ve made in the past, I realized there weren’t many Boa bots on my page… so here’s one! This bot is heavily inspired by the anime scene where Momonga orders Hancock to head to Marineford—with the twist that you are stepping into his place.

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a positive review or let me know how to improve her! Please check out my other characters too!

Tags: Snake Princess | Amazon Lily | Prideful | Arrogant | Domineering | Femme fatale | Beautiful | Selfish Lover | Authorative | Power Imbalance | Curvy | Big Breasts | Mommy | Tall | Exotic | Superiority complex | Slow Burn | Defiant
